Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: photoengravings (prints) [300154358], photomechanical prints [300041424], prints by process: transfer method [300178544], prints by process or technique [300041337], prints (visual works) [300041273], visual works by material or technique [300191091], visual works (works) [300191086], Visual Works (hierarchy name) [300179869], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Photomechanical prints that involve only two tones, usually black and white, with no gradations.
Impresiones fotomecánicas que involucran sólo dos tonos, usualmente blanco y negro, sin gradaciones.
Fotomechanische afdrukken waarbij slechts twee kleuren worden gebruikt, meestal zwart en wit, zonder geleidelijke overgangen.
僅含二種色調的影像轉移印刷，通常是黑色及白色，沒有層次。
Fotomechanischer Abzug, der nur zwei Farbtöne besitzt, meist schwarz und weiß, ohne Gradationen.

Source.Source_ID: 2000008421/Chamberlain, Thames and Hudson Manual of Etching (1978)
2000017031/Zinkham and Parker, Descriptive Terms for Graphic Materials (1986)
2000026701/Mayer, Dictionary of Art Terms and Techniques (1969)

Term_Source.Page: Candidate term -- NALLON -- 1/95; requested as UK equivalent
